name: Hamantaschen Cookie Dough #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the egg to the mixture and beat well.
3. Sift in flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the creamed mixture with milk.
5. Stir in vanilla or lemon extract.
6. Roll out dough on a floured surface into small circles.
7. Cut each circle into thirds.
8. Place a spoonful of filling in the center of each third.
9. Form the edges into triangles and bake at 375°F for 15 to 30 minutes, depending on size.
